THE VIEWER RECORDED THE VIDEO FROM A HOME ON PORCHERS BLUFF ROAD LOOKING TO THE SOUTHEAST TOWARD THE BACK OF DEWEES ISLAND. THE VIDEO SHOWS THE WATERSPOUT IN CONTACT WITH THE SURFACE OF THE WATER WITH A CLEARLY DEFINED SPRAY RING.
